creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Hi Veniamin

As I wrote you, I am likely there, that is the pretty updated version of 
your port. The review can be found here: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D4133

I've tried enabling everything that I could get working, including tests. The ordering of dependencies was done so it's easier to update in the future since upstream has an alphabetically ordered lists of dependencies in its Makefile.PL

Let me know what you think about.

-- Mathieu
